Restaurant Recommendation Process.description: Assisting users with restaurant suggestions based on various criteria such as cuisine, location, dietary needs, and price range.

User Decision and Feedback.description: Handling user decisions on restaurant choices, including acceptance, rejection, or the request for further options, and managing user feedback.
user_actions: Happy with Option or Asks for More
bot_actions: Refine Options Based on Detailed User Feedback
Conclude Interaction with Confirmation or Further Assistance
